name: How much money can I get for a broken leg from work in Murray?
description: Covers meds, 66% wages, disability; amount varies by severity and time off.[1]

mainEntity.name: How much money can I get for a broken leg from work in Murray?

acceptedAnswer.text: Covers meds, 66% wages, disability; amount varies by severity and time off.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Utah workers' comp covers medical bills, lost wages (typically 66-2/3% of average weekly wage), and disability benefits based on injury severity.[1] Value depends on time off, permanency, and light duty refusal impacts.[1] Key factors: (1) Wage replacement caps apply; (2) Permanent impairment rated by doctor; (3) Third-party fault may add damages; (4) Pre-existing reduces if not aggravated.[1][4] Calculate lost wages precisely, get impairment rating, explore third-party claims. Valuation needs case-specific assessment.
